description_long: This is a rectangular chessboard with a classic 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, set within a thick, dark-colored border. The board is elevated and appears to be made of a polished wood or wood-like material, giving it a refined and elegant appearance. On the board, two full sets of chess pieces are arranged in their starting positions, with one set in a light stone or marble color and the other in a dark, almost black hue. The chess pieces are detailed, with distinguishable features for each type, and they rest on circular bases that match their respective colors. The border of the board is wide and has a glossy finish, providing a sturdy frame for the playing surface. The overall design suggests a high-quality, decorative chess set suitable for display in public urban spaces such as parks or plazas.
description: A polished, rectangular chessboard with a dark border and an 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, featuring two full sets of detailed chess pieces in light and dark colors. The board has a refined, elegant appearance with a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full lineup of chess pieces, with the light pieces closest and the dark pieces opposite, all arranged in their starting positions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the board and the profile of the chess pieces, with both sets clearly visible along the length of the board.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark pieces in the foreground and the light pieces in the background, mirroring the front view but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chessboard from the other lateral perspective, with the light pieces now on the right and the dark pieces on the left.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular 8x8 grid of perfectly square tiles, alternating between light beige and dark brown colors. The squares are sharply defined and evenly spaced, creating a classic chessboard appearance. The border is wide and dark, providing a strong visual frame around the grid, and the surface has a polished, glossy finish.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, dark brown frame with a glossy, polished finish, slightly raised above the playing surface. It is plain and unornamented, with no visible inscriptions or decorative markings, providing a clean and elegant edge to the board.
